current_milestone: All seven gates PASS — Phase 1 judge-test infrastructure is done
notes: Gates 1-7 all green as of commit 510da98. Gate 6 verified on Ubuntu + macOS matrix runners via GitHub Actions. Gate 7 (README-only stock-agent judge simulation against Claude Opus 4.7 with adaptive thinking + effort:xhigh + prompt-cached README + dot-to-underscore tool-name bridge) confirmed the end-to-end flow: seeded Alice's belief → Claude read only docs/README.md → called the five MCP tools via the Anthropic-to-MCP bridge → produced the scripted answer containing 'congested' and '14'. Phase 2 arena extensions (Phase G) are unblocked but intentionally gated until the Phase-1 submission is locked.
